title: Emergency Help for Women
rights: Right to file a Zero FIR at any police station regardless of jurisdiction
Right to privacy during recording of statement
Right to free medical treatment in any hospital (public or private) for victims of sexual assault
Protection under the Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act, 2005
avoid: Do not wash clothes or bathe immediately if reporting an assault (preserves evidence)
Do not let police turn you away citing 'jurisdiction' issues (demand a Zero FIR)
